task_objective: Refine Ludusavi launcher logic to prioritize user-created 'Ludusavi' shortcuts and avoid hiding them.
design_decisions: Extended Steam global types to include m_strDisplayName and m_unAppID in SteamAppOverview, and m_mapAppOverview in AppStoreGlobal for searching.
Implemented findUserLudusaviShortcut to search the Steam AppStore for a shortcut named 'Ludusavi'.
Updated ensureLudusaviShortcut to prioritize the user-created shortcut if found.
Modified launchLudusavi to launch user-created shortcuts as-is (using RunGame) without hiding or modifying them.
Maintained existing plugin-managed shortcut logic as a fallback.
results: The plugin now correctly identifies and launches user-created 'Ludusavi' shortcuts, respecting user configuration and visibility preferences, while still providing a managed fallback if no such shortcut exists.
